prompt: Three archery targets side by side, viewed straight on, photorealistic, dramatic studio lighting against a dark background. Left target: arrows clustered tightly in the bottom-left corner, far from center — grouped but wrong. Middle target: arrows scattered randomly across the entire target face, no pattern, chaos. Right target: arrows clustered tightly at the bullseye, perfectly centered. Each target is weathered wood and canvas. The three targets tell a visual story of precision versus accuracy. Cinematic, moody, single frame, no text, no labels, no numbers, no annotations, no charts, no graphs, no overlays, no infographic elements whatsoever.
metaphor: Three archery targets: arrows clustered off-center (high bias), arrows scattered widely (high variance), arrows tight at bullseye (optimal balance).
